subject: small-statured figure in conical dark hat and robes holding a staff with a glowing purple orb, FFXI Black Mage job class
description: A small-statured figure stands in a snowy outdoor environment wearing the classic Black Mage silhouette: a tall conical dark hat and layered dark blue-gray robes. The figure holds a staff topped with a glowing purple gem or orb clearly visible in one hand. The background depicts a snow-covered field with dark rocky formations and pale gray sky lit by blue light shafts — cold, wintry atmosphere. The style is consistent with FFXI's 3D rendering.
foreground: small-statured robed figure in conical hat, staff with purple orb in hand
background: snowy field, dark rocky formations, pale gray sky with blue light
emotion: neutral, composed, solitary figure in a cold vast landscape
